# Pull Request 🚀

## Description

Please describe the changes made in this pull request.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Improvement
- [ ] Documentation update


## Related Issue

Link the related issue if applicable.

Example:
Fixes #12


## Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting:

- [ ] Code builds successfully
- [ ] Changes follow the project structure
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
- [ ] No unnecessary files were added


## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots if your changes affect the UI.


Thank you for contributing to **FreshGradPrep** 🙌
